Home > About Us

Footer Text

  • About Us
    • Contact us

    • Donate

About Us

We are a family of over 320 churches in 234 parishes, almost 100 schools and academy trusts, and a growing number of fresh expressions of Church, in villages, market towns and the city of Leicester across 10 deaneries. We often describe ourselves as a rural diocese with urban heartlands and meet in church buildings, houses, community spaces and schools, with chaplaincies extending our ministry into other areas of community life. With the Kingdom of God as our vision, we look to encourage every Christian in their faith, vocation and ministry as they grow in the depth of their own faith, share their faith in conversation with others, and look for opportunities to act in loving service of others. We often describe this as "everyday faith" Our new Shaped By God Together Minster Communities framework will help our local worshipping communities to grow the Kingdom of God and live out our everyday faith.

  • We use three key questions to help us reflect on our call to active discipleship
  • We encourage ourselves to live our everyday faith by focusing on “everyday prayer”, “everyday witness” and “everyday action
  • We have adopted five strategic priorities which are:

New Communities, Intercultural Communities, Eco Communities, Intergenerational Communities, and Reconciling Communities

Our offices are based in the gardens next to Leicester Cathedral in the St Martins House conference centre, alongside Cafe No:7 and St Martins Lodge, which offers luxury accommodation, profits from which contribute to our clergy stipends and pensions.

Watch our video below and scroll down to find out about our projects, departments, contact details and governance information.

Visit our other websites:

  • Leicester Cathedral
  • Diocesan Board of Education
  • Launde Abbey Retreat Centre
  • St Martins House - Conference Centre and Wedding Venue
  • St Martins Lodge - Hotel Accommodation
  • The St Philip's Centre

Bishops of Leicester and Loughborough

 

Find out more about the Bishops of Leicester and Loughborough. Find out more.

Governance

An introduction to how the Diocese of Leicester is governed. Find out more.

Contact us

This page contains details of how to contact the diocesan office.

Pioneering and fresh expressions of Church

This page gives details about pioneer ministry and fresh expressions of Church in the diocese. Find out more.

Resourcing Churches

This page details the six Resourcing Churches in the Diocese of Leicester. Find out more

Rural Church

This page celebrates our rural communities and has details from our recent Rural Commision. Find out more.

Loving Service

Information, ideas and resources on social issues affecting our world, and loving service we can offer to the community around us. Find out more.

World In A Diocese

Find out about our Link Dioceses and our work to reflect the communities we serve in our church life and leadership. You can also find resources, training and news about our Intercultural Worshipping Communities. Find out more.

Shaped By God Together

Find out more about the Shaped By God Together process, the story so far, FAQ's and resources for your local context.  Find out more.
